- [ ] This PR has a title that briefly describes the work done including the ticket number. See existing PR titles for inspiration.
- [ ] My work is based on designs, which are linked or shown either in the Jira ticket or the description below.
- [ ] My work includes tests or is validated by existing tests.

## Summary
<!-- Please describe what problems your PR addresses. -->

## Features & Changes
- [ ] Multiple calendar views (Monthly, Weekly, Daily) with smooth view switching
- [ ] Modal-based appointment details (replacing page navigation)
- [ ] Support for 13 calendar systems (Gregorian, Ethiopian, Islamic, Hebrew, Persian, Buddhist, Indian, Coptic, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Hijri, Vietnamese)
- [ ] Full mobile responsive design (320px+ phones, tablets, desktops)
- [ ] Enhanced navigation UX (Previous/Next/Today buttons with date range display)
- [ ] Fixed undefined errors in DailyCalendarView with proper null safety
- [ ] Performance optimizations (useMemo and useCallback hooks)
- [ ] Full RTL language support throughout the UI
- [ ] All SCSS color references aligned with Carbon Design v1.83.0

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Component tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed on desktop
- [ ] Manual testing completed on mobile (320px+)
- [ ] Manual testing completed on tablet
- [ ] RTL language support tested
